Aims

Placeholder — what this session builds on from Workshop 1 and what it aims to achieve.

What you will need

Placeholder — materials, any prep, room or platform setup.

Session plan

Time Activity Who
0–10 min Welcome back and check-in Facilitator
10–30 min Placeholder activity All
30–50 min Placeholder activity All
50–55 min Reflection All
55–60 min Close and next steps Facilitator
Facilitator note

_Placeholder — key facilitation consideration for this session._

PeerLadder

A peer-mentoring initiative empowering underrepresented digital Research Technical Professionals to step into leadership.
